reviews.review_text:
Genuine interaction with coming to the game as a new player in the big 26. 

It's bad; really bad. You can boost to 1640 but that's nothing, there's nobody who is still playing the game truly below 1720 and they don't have time for, interest in, or desire to help you clear the content you need parties for. Not to mention the toxic and unlikeable playerbase. I played the game at launch for 400 hours in like 2 months I was super into it, coming back I don't know how or why but I see why I needed 5 characters back then. 

So here's the loop as a new player. You login and do your Abidos run to spend aura of resonance. You get pitiful amounts of materials and rarely maybe even gold. Then you do your Agreos kill, and get effectively nothing of worth. Then logoff and come back tomorrow to do the same thing. 

On a weekly you can run some solo content to get enough gold to maybe to a single 10 tap enhancement, maybe. But if you didn't login for 7 days to get that far you won't have the resources to do it. If you did login, gold is a bottleneck you could get a bit more if you have 4 friends, and maybe even more if you had 16 but genuinely on Balthorr and on Inanna servers nobody wants to help, or even really exist unless it's high end content. 

Note for those who don't know - You can run lower end content without taking rewards, and if you have taken rewards to the cap you can still run the content. Even helping new players "Mokoko's" will earn mokoko coins. But still nobody wants to do it because the rewards are worthless; you would need to run hundreds of mokoko raids/dungeons or other content to get anything worth your time, and honestly it'll never be worth your time. 

If you're below 1780 the game is dead, if you're below 1700 or a new player don't even bother logging in. Supposedly there's gonna be a new pass soon but honestly it won't fix the issue, it'll only move the needle. The loop will stay the same. It takes 1300 gold per enhancement. Your best once a week solo dungeon gives 4500 gold. Do your other 6 for the week you might have enough for 1 10 tap. But with enhancement rates below 5% you need a lot more than you're getting. Best to let the game die and see what people do with whatever scraps get left behind.

Amazing raids, beautiful combat, but ultimately a game that asks for more than it's worth.

Lost Ark has the best raids I've ever experienced in an MMO. The boss fights are spectacular, the classes are fun and distinct, and the animations are some of the best in the genre.

Unfortunately, all of that is overshadowed by how much of your life the game expects you to dedicate to it.

The endgame quickly turns into an endless checklist of daily and weekly chores spread across multiple characters. Instead of logging in because you want to play, you often end up logging in because you feel like you have to. The raids are incredible, but getting to enjoy them means wading through a mountain of repetitive busywork.

I had a lot of great moments with Lost Ark, and I'll always remember some of its raids fondly. That said, I can't really recommend investing your time into it in 2026. There are simply better MMO options out there that respect your time far more while still offering excellent endgame content.

Ive never seen a game have so many players come across as literal drug addicts. Scroll through the reviews and see tons of these people have become heavily addicted.. wild how you factor a game coming out in 2022 has people in 2026 with 18000hours.. should be sending any of its remaining player base wellness checks and funded rehab

Its so tragic.
The game has so much potential, but the pay-to-win aspect is too big.
If you dont want to invest your organs, your not able to play the actual content....

Combat and graphics was amazing for this game, played it at the launch and got my money's worth but recently tried to turn back the game but it's still the P2W as it is. So i can't invest anymore time to this after great alternatives like PoE2 and D4

Still can recommend it tho
After having deleted new world forever with no refunds i will never be buying another amazon game.  aside from the music and one plot 30 hours into the story, this game sucks.

I originally quit around hard brelshaza 1540/1560 i had all of 6 gold chars on it back then, mainly quit cause i used to bus and waiting for ppl, would make me end up doing everything night before reset also dailies were kinda annoying taking up good amount of my time. I recently came back caught up to speed a bit with the explo/character progression related stuff but its just not interesting is also super slow u push one char to 1705 and there aint no any sort of stronghold upgrade for honing or anything for others, is just super slow. Also still feels like a big chore to run all 6 chars each week/doesnt seem that much faster then it used to be, when i left. I cant even think of running all 6 characters with randoms of the non/solo content if they(most of my characters) would again reach the newer raids where that aint present. Game was peak back when it launched, from my experience. U could grind and have the the crystaline/aura buffs up, now there is even more of them only payable ones, seems like playerbase is just being drained before it fully dies. I cant even get my mind around new player experience though, i guess u would get express pass for 1 char but u will still have to hone your way up on miserable chances. U guys cooked back in 2022/2023 really had some fun memories when it launched even though there was a lot more stuff with una weeklies on resets and stuff but it was manageable, cause i was progressing now is just miserable. Ty for those days, but i wouldnt recommend it now to anyone, gl to guys that are gona stick with the game as well wishing u the luck regarding EOS allegations, i might even come back again at one point if it stays up.
Best game ever, sent me to the hospital a few times. Would recommend!

I have such a love and hate relationship towards this game.
I love the endgame raids, classes and combat, but.... 
You need to be literally unemployed and grind with multiple characters constantly to be able to play this game without constantly emptying your wallet into the game as the upgrade system literally drains you out of all the gold. Oh and you still might not get a single upgrade...

EAC- Cheating Ban...Falsely.
Tried communicating with 4 reps and 2 sups at this time. Played since pre-launch, got a Cheating Violation - Perma-Banned for no damn reason. Still trying to get the ban reverted, Four an half years and spent a decent amount of money (Legally). Game is on a brink of EOSing and this is what you hand of to your customer/client/consumers? Disgusting.
good game ruined by time gating. :(
THE PANDEMIC GAME OF THE UNEMPLOYED 2022. If you're still playing this game, either go start a family or go on indeed.com
